title: <div>How do revision and reflection help improve storytelling? Have you ever cha
content:
How do revision and reflection help improve storytelling? Have you ever changed your perspective on an event after telling it multiple times?


Week 3: Drafting & Revision

Day 9: The Art of Revision
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Choose a paragraph from your writing and rewrite it in a different tone (e.g., turn a formal passage into something humorous or dramatic).

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why is revision essential to strong writing? How does rewriting differ from simply correcting errors?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Think about a book, movie, or speech that has been revised multiple times. How do revisions affect the final product?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you could rewrite history, what event would you change, and why? How might the "revision" affect the outcome?


Day 10: Feedback & Incorporating Changes
context: From document: Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 — chunk 7 (chunk 7/19)
